subject: Ecology
title: Levels of Ecological Study
description: A 60-second lesson on Levels of Ecological Study.

hook.text: Ecology zooms from a single organism all the way out to the entire planet.

buildup.text: Organismal ecology asks how one creature survives in its specific environment.

discovery.text: Population ecology studies groups; community ecology studies species interactions.

twist.text: Ecosystem ecology tracks energy and nutrients; the biosphere covers the whole Earth.

climax.text: Each level reveals patterns invisible at other scales—like zooming on a fractal.

quiz.question: What does ecosystem ecology focus on?
